privileged_info_summary: The project file is a real MSPDI XML from a commercial construction project (Three-story Office Building, 76000 sq ft) with 146 tasks spanning Jan 3, 2000 to Apr 26, 2001. Task UID=42 (ID=42, row 42) is 'Cure piers and foundations' with original Duration PT56H0M0S (7 days) and PercentComplete=0; agent must set to 100%. Task UID=44 (ID=44, row 44) is 'Strip column piers and foundation forms'; setup_task.sh inflates its duration from PT24H0M0S (3 days) to PT40H0M0S (5 days), and the agent must reduce it back to 3 days (PT24H0M0S, accepted range 20-28h). Task UID=48 (ID=48, row 48) is 'Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors' with current ConstraintType=0 (ASAP); agent must set to ConstraintType=4 (SNET = Start No Earlier Than) with ConstraintDate containing '2000-03-01'. Note: MSPDI code 4=SNET, 5=SNLT — do not confuse. Task UID=46 (ID=46, row 46) is 'Prepare and pour concrete floor in elevator pit' (last task in Foundations group, WBS 1.5.14); the new milestone 'Foundation Remediation Inspection' must be inserted after it with a Finish-to-Start predecessor link (PredecessorUID=46). Resource UID=2 is 'G.C. Project Management' (Type=1 work resource) and must be assigned to the milestone. No baseline data exists in the original XML; agent must create Baseline 0 via Save Baseline. The status date must be set to 2000-02-15. Output must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/output/schedule_recovery.xml. UIDs and IDs (row numbers) are identical for all referenced tasks.
